ogTitle: Rochedale vs Rockhampton City: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rochedale and Rockhampton City.
heading: Rochedale vs Rockhampton City — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rochedale, Queensland and Rockhampton City, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rockhampton City has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Rochedale (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rochedale or Rockhampton City safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rochedale has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Rockhampton City scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rochedale scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Rockhampton City scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rochedale or Rockhampton City?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rockhampton City has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
